questions.question: Prove that the function f: R - R defined by f(x) = x^2 is one-to-one. (8 hours)
questions.hint: Use the definition of one-to-one and the properties of the square function.

questions.question: Let A and B be sets. Prove that the Cartesian product A x B has exactly 8 elements if and only if |A| = |B| = 2. (8 hours)
questions.hint: Consider the definition of the Cartesian product and use the properties of the cardinality function.

questions.question: Find the number of elements in the relation R = {(a, b) | a, b ∈ Z, a - b = 8} on the set of integers. (8 hours)
questions.hint: List out the pairs in the relation and count them.
